successStories.title: Real Students, Real Results
successStories.description: Join the league of successful students who achieved their dreams with Grey Matters.

stories.name: Priya Sharma
stories.testimonial: Grey Matters transformed my IELTS preparation. The live classes, mock tests, and personalized feedback helped me achieve 8.5 bands in just 6 weeks. Now studying at UofT!

stories.name: Rahul Patel
stories.testimonial: The AI-powered practice tests at Grey Matters are incredible. I could track my progress daily and focus on my weak areas. Scored 85 on my first attempt!

stories.name: Anjali Reddy
stories.testimonial: The trainers at Grey Matters are simply the best. Their strategies for writing and speaking made all the difference. Forever grateful!

stories.name: Vikram Singh
stories.testimonial: From IELTS preparation to PR visa filing, Grey Matters handled everything seamlessly. Got my Canada PR in just 8 months!
